title: Benefits of DCA via Recurring Buy
title2: Risks of DCA via Recurring Buy
description: DCA does not include lump sum investments during market dips, thus you may miss out on a larger profit.
description2: Such large gains require investors to time the market correctly which is almost impossible, which is why DCA can help smooth out market timings
description3: DCA strategy does not help identify good investments. Hence, it’s important to DYOR before committing to a DCA approach.

items.title: Steady Portfolio Growth
items.description: Consistent investments at periodic intervals gradually grows your crypto wealth over time and reap the gains of invested projects’ growth.

items.title: Disciplined Saving
items.description: Automates your crypto purchases and ensures you invest with discipline regardless of market conditions.

items.title: Risk Reduction
items.description: Manages impact from the volatile crypto market by spreading out your investments and smoothing out price swings.

items.title: Convenience & Flexibility
items.description: Choose between weekly, bi-weekly or even monthly purchases and cryptocurrencies you want to buy beforehand.

items.title: Easy Access to FAZ 3 Ecosystem
items.description: Get your stash of crypto ready to explore other FAZ 3 products such as staking, spot trading, or even buying your first NFT.

items.title: Emotional Detachment
items.description: Remove the stress of timing the market and making impulsive decisions based on market conditions.
